hooks.command: if [ -f "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/docs/.chain-lock" ]; then echo 'BLOCK: Chain lock exists. Use /chain-run to continue the chain.'; exit 1; fi

case "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" in */docs/0[1-9]-*.md) git -C "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" add "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" && git -C "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" commit -m "docs(agent): $(basename "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH")" 2>/dev/null || true ;; esac
